name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's conversational AI assistant for text generation, Q&A, creative writing, and complex problem-solving across diverse domains.

name: Midjourney
description: AI-powered tool that creates stunning, highly detailed images from text descriptions using cutting-edge diffusion models.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests real-time code completions, entire functions, and debugging help across multiple IDEs.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's latest text-to-image generation model with exceptional quality, nuanced text rendering, and prompt understanding.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's helpful and harmless AI assistant designed for thoughtful, nuanced conversations and long-document analysis.

name: Runway ML
description: Next-generation video creation suite offering AI-powered text-to-video, motion brush, and professional editing tools.

name: Jasper
description: Enterprise-grade AI content platform for generating marketing copy, blog posts, social media content, and brand voices.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered search engine that provides direct, cited answers with real-time web access and source transparency.

name: Notion AI
description: Seamlessly integrated AI writing assistant within Notion that summarizes, brainstorms, drafts, and organizes your workspace.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source image generation model that runs locally, offering full customization, fine-tuning, and community-driven development.

name: Whisper
description: OpenAI's robust automatic speech recognition system supporting 99 languages with near-human accuracy transcription.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built for pair-programming with AI, featuring intelligent codebase understanding and multi-file editing.
